/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zipbrute.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o zipbrute   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libzip/1.11.4_1/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libzip/1.11.4_1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib libzip_bruteforce_core.a -lzip -lssl -lcrypto -lsqlite3
